Bash(git -C D:/JcampFX commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Phase 2 complete — DCRD Brain + Strategies + Exit System + News Layer

New modules:
- src/signal.py: Standardized Signal dataclass \(V2.8\)
- src/dcrd/: 3-layer DCRD engine \(StructuralScore 0-100, DynamicModifier
  -15 to +15, RangeBarIntelligence 0-20\) with anti-flipping filter \(VD.5\)
- src/news_layer.py: NewsEvent + NewsLayer with JSON stub; ZMQ hook for Phase 4
- src/performance_tracker.py: Per-strategy rolling 10-trade window + cooldown
- src/risk_engine.py: Dynamic 1-3% sizing \(CS + performance multipliers\)
- src/exit_manager.py: Partial exit tiers \(60/70/75/80%\) + Dynamic Chandelier SL
- src/strategies/: TrendRider \(CS>=70\), BreakoutRider \(CS 30-70\), RangeRider \(CS<30\)
- src/brain_core.py: 11-gate orchestrator with auto-discovery + correlation filter
- data/news_events.json: 12 sample events for 2025 testing

Modified:
- src/config.py: Added CSM_PAIRS \(9 pairs\), TIMEFRAME_4H/1H, OHLC dirs
- src/data_fetcher.py: Added fetch/load for 4H + 1H OHLC, --dcrd-only CLI flag

Tests \(5 new files, 138 Phase 2 tests\):
- tests/test_dcrd.py: VD.1-VD.5, VD.7, VD.8
- tests/test_exit_manager.py: VE.1-VE.7
- tests/test_risk_engine.py: VR.1-VR.6
- tests/test_strategies.py: V2.2-V2.4, V2.11, V2.12, V2.14
- tests/test_brain_core.py: V2.5-V2.9, V2.11-V2.13

Result: 164/164 tests pass \(138 Phase 2 + 26 Phase 1\)
Phase 2 gate V2.14 cleared.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C D:/JcampFX commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Phase 3 complete — Web Backtester + Cinema tab

New modules:
- backtester/cost_model.py: Entry/exit slippage \(1.0 pip\) + $7/lot commission

- src/config.py: Added BACKTEST_RESULTS_DIR, WALK_FORWARD_* constants

- TestStrategyCooldownInBacktest \(V3.8\): 5-loss cooldown

- TestNewsBlockingInBacktest \(V3.11\): HIGH event gates entry

- TestWalkForwardCycles: 4 cycles, non-overlapping, correct boundaries
- TestResultsPersistence: Parquet save/load roundtrip
- TestWeekendClose: Friday close detection

Bash(git -C D:/JcampFX commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Phase 3 bugfix + results documented + PRD v2.2 added

Bugfixes \(backtester/engine.py, src/config.py, src/risk_engine.py\):
- Fix: 2R_CAP and WEEKEND_CLOSE were closing all open trades using the
  current bar''s close price regardless of trade pair, causing cross-pair
  price poisoning \(e.g. GBPUSD trade closed at USDJPY price ~147 →
  1.46M fake pips → $291k phantom profit then $196M crash\).
  Fix: track last_close[pair] per bar; each trade now closes at its own
  pair''s most recent price.
- Fix: no MAX_LOT cap — runaway compounding once equity was inflated.
  Added MAX_LOT = 5.0 in config.py; clamped in calculate_lot_size\(\).

Phase 3 first clean backtest result \(run_20260219_150916\):
  Net P&L: +$44.96 | Sharpe: 0.60 | Max DD: 17.1%
  Win Rate: 39.9% | PF: 1.07 | Trades: 188
  \(DCRD fallback CS=50 — no 4H/1H OHLC yet; all BreakoutRider regime\)

Documentation:
- CLAUDE.md: updated PRD reference to v2.2, added Phase 3 results table,
  added v2.2 upgrade scope \(R12–R18\) with recommended implementation order
- JcampFX_PRD_v2.2.md: added \(20-pip migration, phantom liquidity,
  DCRD calibration, regime deterioration, BreakoutRider spec, session filter\)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C D:/JcampFX commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Phase 3 iteration — v2.2 complete + TrendRider entry rework + debug findings

v2.2 features \(all R12–R18 complete, 244/244 tests pass\):
- R12: 20-pip Range Bars \(majors\), 25-pip \(JPY pairs\); RB cache rebuilt
- R13: is_gap_adjacent phantom flag on Range Bars \(VP.2\)
- R14: Phantom exit fills at actual tick boundary price \(VP.6\)
- R15: DCRD percentile calibration pipeline → data/dcrd_config.json \(VC.1–VC.5\)
- R16: Regime deterioration force-close \(CS drop >40pts from entry CS\) \(VD.9/VE.8\)
- R17: BreakoutRider — Keltner\(20,1.5×ATR\) + BB compression P20 + RB speed ≥2/30min
- R18: Session filter module \(src/session_filter.py\) — Tokyo/London/NY hard/soft per strategy

TrendRider entry rework \(trend_rider.py\):
- Fixed r_dist=0 bug: for range bars close==low on down bars → SL==entry → skip
- Switched to RESUMPTION BAR entry: enter on first trend-direction bar AFTER pullback
  SL = pullback bar''s structural extreme \(natural, non-zero r_dist\)
- Added _adx_series\(\) returning full ADX series \(enables slope analysis\)
- Added _adx_is_rising\(\) slope filter \(ADX must be rising over last 5 1H bars\)
- Staircase kept at 5 bars \(3 bars = too noisy: 430 trades, 34% WR\)

BreakoutRider fix \(breakout_rider.py\):
- BB compression now uses Range Bar closes \(was 1H OHLC — temporal mismatch causing
  only 1 qualifying bar in 2 years of data\)

Backtester improvement \(engine.py\):
- Added _report_closed_trades\(\): feeds R-multiples to BrainCore PerformanceTracker
  enabling the strategy cooldown system to function in backtest

Backtest results \(see CLAUDE.md for full table\):
- Best run: 292 trades, 36% WR, -$218 \(resumption entry, ADX>25, no slope filter\)
- Root cause: 34.8% partial-reach rate; need ~40% for breakeven
- USDJPY dominates \(47% of trades\), EURUSD/GBPUSD near breakeven
- ADX slope filter: 180 trades, 35% WR, -$199 \(fewer trades, same WR quality\)

Next session:
- Build backtest playback/Trade Inspector \(bar-by-bar context per signal\)
- Visually debug Oct-24 \(17% WR\) and Jul-25 \(0% WR\) losing months
- Determine if staircase pattern is detecting real trends or ranging bounces

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "D:\\JcampFX" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix\(dashboard\): correct Inspector URL routing for multi-page Dash app

Fixes 500 Internal Server Error when clicking "Inspect" links from Cinema.

Changes:
- Remove duplicate dcc.Location from Inspector page \(use root app''s Location\)
- Use "pathname" output for Back button instead of clearing search string
- Keep all callbacks referencing root app''s dcc.Location\(id="url"\)

Root cause:
- Dash multi-page apps should have ONE Location component in root layout
- Page callbacks can reference the root Location by id
- Having duplicate Location components causes callback conflicts

Testing:
- Created test_inspector_callback.py \(cannot run due to dash.register_page requirement\)
- Manual testing required via dashboard server

Known remaining issues \(from Debug/ folder\):
1. Metadata panel and chart may still render blank \(needs server testing\)
2. Trade 9bb53c06 shows -6.00R \(USDJPY BUY with 0.2-pip SL - TrendRider bug\)
3. Unusual Range Bar patterns \(weekend gaps or phantom bars\)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

3. Unusual Range Bar patterns \(MEDIUM\) - phantom/gap detection

- USDJPY BUY, Entry=158.14, SL=158.138 \(0.2 pips!\)
- Closed at 158.128, loss=1.2 pips, R=-6.00R
- Root cause: TrendRider places SL at pullback bar extreme
  without validating minimum SL distance
- Fix: Add MIN_SL_PIPS check in trend_rider.py:analyze\(\)

Testing checklist added for:
- Inspector page functionality verification
- Trade 9bb53c06 investigation via Inspector
- Range Bar validation and phantom/gap flags

Bash(git -C "D:\\JcampFX" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix\(trendrider\): add minimum 10-pip SL distance validation

Fixes critical bug where shallow pullbacks created extremely tight SLs,
causing inflated negative R-multiples \(e.g., -6.00R instead of -1.05R max\).

Bug context:
  Trade 9bb53c06 \(USDJPY BUY, 2024-04-29\)
  - Entry: 158.14, SL: 158.138 \(only 0.2 pips away!\)
  - Close: 158.128, Loss: 1.2 pips
  - R-multiple: -6.00R \(loss / risk = 1.2 / 0.2\)
  - Root cause: Pullback bar''s low was too close to resumption bar''s close

Fix applied:
  - Added MIN_SL_PIPS = 10 validation in TrendRider.analyze\(\)
  - If abs\(entry - sl\) < 10 pips, signal is rejected with debug log
  - Prevents all future tight-SL scenarios across all pairs

Tests added:
  - test_trendrider_rejects_tight_sl: Verifies signals with <10 pip SL
    are rejected \(simulates the 9bb53c06 scenario\)
  - test_trendrider_accepts_valid_sl: Verifies signals with >=10 pip SL
    are accepted \(regression check\)

Test results:
  - 260/260 tests pass \(2 new + 258 existing\)
  - No regressions introduced

Impact:
  - Trade count will likely decrease slightly \(tight-SL setups filtered\)
  - Win rate should improve \(low-quality setups eliminated\)
  - Maximum loss per trade guaranteed <= -1.05R \(instead of unbounded\)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "D:\\JcampFX" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix\(dashboard\): handle missing TrendRider debug fields in old backtest runs

Fixes 500 error when Inspector tries to display trades from backtest runs
that don''t have TrendRider debug fields \(pullback_bar_idx, entry_bar_idx, etc\).

Root cause:
- Old backtest runs \(before debug field implementation\) don''t have these fields
- _build_inspector_chart\(\) tried to access trade["pullback_bar_idx"] which was None
- Arithmetic operations on None \(e.g., None - 5 + 1\) caused TypeError

Fix applied:
- Added None checks for all TrendRider debug fields before accessing
- Staircase highlight only renders if all required fields exist
- Function signatures allow None for search_query parameter
- _parse_query_string handles None gracefully with isinstance check

Impact:
- Inspector now works with both old and new backtest runs
- Old runs show trades without staircase highlights \(fields missing\)
- New runs \(with debug fields\) show full staircase visualization

Testing needed:
- Start dashboard server
- Click "Inspect" on any trade from run_20260219_190902
- Verify metadata panel and chart render correctly
- Verify no 500 errors in browser console

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
